---
title: "Review of The Story of the Christians and the Moors in Spain"
---

## Review of The Story of the Christians and the Moors in Spain

**Author:** Mary Augusta Ward
**Date:** 1878
**Imprint:** <i>Academy</i> (16 November 1878) 463-4

### Notes

The review was unsigned.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
